desc: Finalize the SMP/broken_wfi/MPIDR + cpufreq upstream drafts in done/; checkpatch; ready for CJ to post. Reframe broken_wfi around Sven Peter's c22ca847: CYC_OVRD_DISABLE_WFI_RET left set makes WFI lose the register file and re-enter at RVBAR; its SYS_IMP_APL_CYC_OVRD fix is gated by apple_sysregs_unlocked and remains a no-op on raw-boot T6040. Cite yuka 2e6ac0b0 and Sven's 954f80c6 secondary MMU fix. Update 2026-07-21: upstream still classifies T6040/T6041 AIC sysregs as locked on macOS 26.6 RC/27 beta 4; WFE park, idle=nop, and the AIC trap-avoidance patch remain required. EFI-PSCI powerdown progress is future context, not a replacement for the J614s raw-kboot audit (done/2026-07-21-asahi-dev-log-review.md)
author: claude
